texto: One of the most beautiful words is touch
autor: it exquisitely represents our need to prove ourselves that we are not in a dream!
explicacao: Citação de it exquisitely represents our need to prove ourselves that we are not in a dream! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “One of the most beautiful words is touch” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, beautiful em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
